summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LGSS SCUM Server Manager Iteration 5. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all new features: no splash screen, new tactical theme (default), 4 theme options (tactical/ghost/jungle/wastelander), server folder path with 'Servers' subfolder, installed field default false, steam_app_id default '3792580', install endpoint, save-config endpoint returning 11 config files, and UI button state changes based on installed status.
critical_code_review_comments: Install endpoint is SIMULATED (sets installed=true in DB) - real SteamCMD call is in Electron main process (lgss:install-server)
Save-config endpoint returns file plan only - real file writing is done by Electron (lgss:write-config-files)
User list files (BannedUsers.ini, WhitelistedUsers.ini, ExclusiveUsers.ini, SilencedUsers.ini) are empty by default - this is expected behavior
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
seed_data_creation: Tests use POST /api/setup/reset to clear state. PUT /api/setup with {is_admin_confirmed:true, selected_disk:'/', manager_path:'/tmp/LGSSManagers', completed:true} to setup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 features working. New endpoints: POST /servers/{id}/install (sets installed=true, status=Stopped), POST /servers/{id}/save-config (returns {config_dir, files[], count}). Server folder_path now includes 'Servers' subfolder: {manager_path}/Servers/ServerN. New fields: installed (default false), steam_app_id (default '3792580'). Frontend data-testids: server-install-button (shows 'Download Server Files' when not installed), server-start-button (shows after install), server-update-button (shows after install), save-config-files-btn. Themes: tactical (default), ghost, jungle, wastelander. No splash screen anymore.

backend: New server has installed=false by default
New server has steam_app_id='3792580' by default

save-config returns 11 files: ServerSettings.ini, AdminUsers.ini, ServerSettingsAdminUsers.ini, BannedUsers.ini, WhitelistedUsers.ini, ExclusiveUsers.ini, SilencedUsers.ini, EconomyOverride.json, RaidTimes.json, Notifications.json, Input.ini
Each file has valid path prefix of config_dir
PUT /api/servers/{id} (rename) preserves settings and installed status
frontend: No splash screen (data-testid='splash-screen' does NOT exist)
4 theme options available: tactical, ghost, jungle, wastelander
Theme switching works correctly for all 4 themes
Non-installed server shows 'Download Server Files' button (data-testid='server-install-button')
After install: Install button hidden, Start button visible, Update (SteamCMD) button visible
Toast shows config path after save-config: '/tmp/LGSSManagers/Servers/Server1/SCUM/Saved/Config/WindowsServer'
Top bar: START ALL button (data-testid='start-all-btn') works
Top bar: UPDATE SERVERS button (data-testid='update-all-servers-btn') exists
Top bar: MANAGER UPDATE button (data-testid='manager-update-btn') exists

mocked_apis.note: Install is simulated (backend sets installed=true). Save-config returns file plan only. Real SteamCMD and file writing happens in Electron.
list: /servers/{id}/save-config - returns file plan, Electron writes files via lgss:write-config-files
